'''jahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:otherguess|otherguess]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-h-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:otherguess|otherguess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jahate|jahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jahatesher|jahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahatesherĂ«m|jahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jahatero|jahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jahateshĂ«|jahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahateshĂ«m|jahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijahatero|gokijahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijahateshĂ«|gokijahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijahateshĂ«m|gokijahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojahankerom|gojahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojahankeshĂ«|gojahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojahankeshĂ«m|gojahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojahankeya|gojahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jahaterom|jahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahatemu|jahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jahateya|jahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijahaterom|gokijahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijahatemu|gokijahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijahateya|gokijahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jahahate|jahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jahahatesher|jahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahahatesherĂ«m|jahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jahahatero|jahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jahahateshĂ«|jahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahahateshĂ«m|jahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijahahatero|gokijahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijahahateshĂ«|gokijahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijahahateshĂ«m|gokijahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojahahankerom|gojahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojahahankeshĂ«|gojahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojahahankeshĂ«m|gojahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojahahankeya|gojahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jahahaterom|jahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jahahatemu|jahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jahahateya|jahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijahahaterom|gokijahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijahahatemu|gokijahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijahahateya|gokijahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠte|jĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠtesher|jĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠtero|jĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠtero|gokijĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠhĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠhĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠterom|jĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠtemu|jĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠhĂŠteya|jĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠterom|gokijĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠhĂŠteya|gokijĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafhafte|jafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafhaftesher|jafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafhaftesherĂ«m|jafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafhaftero|jafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafhafteshĂ«|jafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafhafteshĂ«m|jafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafhaftero|gokijafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafhafteshĂ«|gokijafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafhafteshĂ«m|gokijafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafhafnkerom|gojafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafhafnkeshĂ«|gojafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafhafnkeshĂ«m|gojafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafhafnkeya|gojafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafhafterom|jafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafhaftemu|jafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafhafteya|jafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafhafterom|gokijafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafhaftemu|gokijafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafhafteya|gokijafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
